_comment: مثال body لـ PUT /api/admin/cases/:caseId/university-overrides/:universityId — أو من UI: University OSCE flow overrides

maneuverOpeningMessages.inspection: For Cairo University OSCE format: describe only inspection findings in 2 minutes. Focus on precordium and JVP.
maneuverOpeningMessages.palpation: Palpation only — apex and thrills. No need to mention auscultation findings yet.
